description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Xbox One / Series that can be triggered manually. It should run on a windows-latest environment with concurrency control, cancelling any in-progress runs for the same workflow and reference. The workflow should check out the code, use ccache, set up msbuild, build the project using a batch script, copy artifacts, upload them as a GitHub Actions artifact, and package and upload a release if the workflow is triggered by a release event.
